expected_recovered_crates.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 108,000 (40% of 270k annual loss). Spread reflects execution risk: low covers underperformance, high covers viral overshoot toward stress-case ~80% recovery indicated in missing_values estimation method.

cost_per_crate_handling_dkk.rationale: Base anchored on Q2 pilot CPRC target (15.28 DKK/crate) per the suggested estimation method; low at 10 DKK risk threshold rounded to 8, high at 20 DKK upper bound of triangulation range.

annual_crate_loss_volume.rationale: Base from stated 270,000 baseline. Medium uncertainty (priority high): ~25% spread around baseline reflects measurement uncertainty in annual loss tracking before the IT tracking system is fully deployed.
